name: Ham and Cheese Deli Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup shredded sharp cheddar or Swiss cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the potato salad dressing and creamy mustard blend.
2. Stir in the diced potatoes, ham, shredded cheese, chopped pickles, and diced onion until evenly distributed.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap or a lid to chill for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
